checkin.journal:
Sleeping relatively ok, was sleepy on the plane today felt I could fall asleep but almost did, felt that pain was less than 5 weeks ago
Woke up in a good modd
Meditation 🧘‍♂️ 
Packing for Germany
Flight to Munich then to Hamburg and taxi to Luebeck
We watched Manifest and I played N wayback
We walked in town and ate Flamkuchen 
Unpacked
Very calm morning, slowly getting everything in order in a good mood 😄, made cosita coffee ☕️
Inspired by: how nicely the whole trip was - very smooth
